data.tavily:iron: {"name": "Iron", "aliases": ["Iron oxides", "Ferric hydroxide"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Generally recognized as safe; considered virtually non-absorbable as an additive, though sustained intake of nano-forms may perturb the gut-liver axis.", "conditions_affected": ["gut health", "liver health"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:chromium chloride: {"name": "Chromium chloride", "aliases": ["trivalent chromium", "chromium(III)"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Acts as a nutrient source that may assist in blood sugar control, insulin sensitivity, and glucose metabolism.", "conditions_affected": ["prediabetes", "type 1 diabetes", "type 2 diabetes", "high blood sugar"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:chloride: {"name": "Chloride (as food additive salts)", "aliases": ["E 507", "E 508", "E 509", "E 511", "Hydrochloric acid", "Potassium chloride", "Calcium chloride", "Magnesium chloride"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Generally recognized as safe (GRAS) at authorized levels; however, excessive doses exceeding 0.4% may cause toxic effects on development and the cardiac and neuronal systems.", "conditions_affected": ["cardiac system", "neuronal system", "developmental health"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:vitamin b6: {"name": "Vitamin B6", "aliases": ["pyridoxine"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "High doses from supplements are linked to peripheral neuropathy, characterized by tingling, burning, or numbness in the hands and feet.", "conditions_affected": ["peripheral neuropathy"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": 10, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:biotin: {"name": "Biotin", "aliases": ["vitamin B7"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Generally safe as a nutrient, but high levels can significantly interfere with the accuracy of certain laboratory test results, potentially leading to incorrect diagnoses.", "conditions_affected": ["laboratory test accuracy"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:vitamin d3: {"name": "Cholecalciferol", "aliases": ["Vitamin D3"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Essential for bone health and metabolism, but excessive intake can cause hypercalcemia, organ damage, and respiratory toxicity if inhaled.", "conditions_affected": ["hypercalcemia", "calcium-phosphorus metabolism issues", "bone health"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:chromium: {"name": "Chromium", "aliases": ["Cr", "Trivalent Chromium", "Hexavalent Chromium"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Essential nutrient in trace amounts; however, hexavalent chromium (Cr(VI)) exposure is toxic and can cause respiratory, kidney, and liver damage, while dietary chromium is generally considered safe.", "conditions_affected": ["occupational asthma", "kidney damage", "liver damage", "respiratory irritation"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:iodide: {"name": "Iodide", "aliases": ["potassium iodide", "iodine source"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Serves as an essential mineral for iodine nutrition, but can react with chlorinated water to form potentially harmful iodoacetic acids.", "conditions_affected": ["iodine deficiency"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:zinc: {"name": "Zinc", "aliases": ["Zn"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Essential for cell growth, differentiation, and DNA synthesis; however, excessive intake can lead to toxicity, nausea, vomiting, or diarrhea.", "conditions_affected": ["acne", "colds", "immune system function"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:l lysine hydrochloride: {"name": "L-lysine hydrochloride", "aliases": ["L-lysine monohydrochloride"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Generally well-tolerated when used as a supplement, though it is reported to be an irritant to skin and eyes in specific production forms.", "conditions_affected": [], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": 3750, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:pantothenic acid: {"name": "Pantothenic Acid", "aliases": ["Vitamin B5"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Essential for metabolism of carbohydrates, fatty acids, and amino acids; aids in the production of proteins, hormones, red blood cells, and neurotransmitters.", "conditions_affected": [], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:copper: {"name": "Copper", "aliases": ["cupric sulfate", "Cu"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "An essential trace element required for normal physiological function; no evidence links dietary copper to cardiovascular disease, cognitive decline, arthritis, or cancer.", "conditions_affected": [], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": 2, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:vitamin k2-7: {"name": "Vitamin K2-7", "aliases": ["Menaquinone-7", "MK-7"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Supports heart, bone, and dental health.", "conditions_affected": ["heart disease", "bone health issues"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": 0.375, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:vitamin b12: {"name": "Vitamin B12", "aliases": ["Cobalamin"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Supports brain and nerve cell function; generally low toxicity, though high-dose long-term supplementation may be associated with increased lung cancer risk.", "conditions_affected": ["Vitamin B12 deficiency"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:vitamin b2: {"name": "Riboflavin", "aliases": ["Vitamin B2"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Essential for energy production, cell growth, and converting carbohydrates into glucose.", "conditions_affected": [], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:co-enzyme q10: {"name": "Coenzyme Q10", "aliases": ["CoQ10", "Ubiquinone"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Generally considered a safe supplement with minimal side effects and low potential for drug interactions.", "conditions_affected": [], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:boron: {"name": "Boron", "aliases": ["Borates"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Excessive intake may cause toxicity resulting in headache, renal injury, dermatitis, alopecia, and reproductive or developmental issues.", "conditions_affected": ["reproductive system", "kidneys", "skin", "hair growth"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": 20, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:ferrous fumerate: {"name": "Ferrous Fumarate", "aliases": ["Iron(II) fumarate", "E1"], "safety_rating": "safe", "health_impact": "Used as an iron nutritional supplement with high bioavailability, though it can cause gastrointestinal distress.", "conditions_affected": ["constipation", "diarrhea", "nausea", "vomiting", "stomach cramps"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
data.tavily:manganese: {"name": "Manganese", "aliases": ["Mn"], "safety_rating": "caution", "health_impact": "Essential nutrient, but high levels via ingestion or inhalation can cause dose-related neurologic dysfunction.", "conditions_affected": ["neurologic disorders"], "banned_in": [], "daily_limit_mg": null, "source": "tavily", "confidence": 0.65}
